CommandLine.Parameter: "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\4PP065_0351_P74\ashwac.br" -L "Acp10man: V5.24.1, Acp10par: V5.24.1, AsArLog: V*, AsBrStr: V*, AsIecCon: V*, AsTCP: V*, astime: V*, Blink: V*, ComTCP_L: V*, Gen_Axis: V*, Gen_Device: V*, NcGlobal: V5.24.1, operator: V*, runtime: V*, S_filter: V*, Signal_Mng: V*, standard: V*, sys_lib: V*" -c "Config1" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, SafetyRelease: 1.10.0, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -M IA32 -B B4.91 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "Config1" -T SG4

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -c "Config1" -sysconf -S "4PP065_0351_P74" -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, SafetyRelease: 1.10.0, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\4PP065_0351_P74\sysconf.br" -T SG4 -B B4.91 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -s "Config1"

"$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Physical\Config1\Hardware.hw" -v V1.00.0 -S "4PP065_0351_P74" -o "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)\Temp\Objects\Config1\4PP065_0351_P74\asfw.br" -T SG4 -B B4.91 -P "$(AS_PROJECT_PATH)" -c "Config1" -zip -s "Config1" -firmware -Z "mappView: 5.24.4, Acp10Arnc0: 5.24.1, mapp: 5.24.1, SafetyRelease: 1.10.0, UnitSystem: n.d, Connectivity: n.d, RemanentData: n.d, FMUExport: n.d, ProgrammingSystem: n.d, TextSystem: n.d, AAS: n.d"
